sessions.summary: Priya reviewed her November finances after salary credit and made a plan to cut food delivery spending in half and transfer ₹30,000 to her house fund on the 25th.
commitments: Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund on November 25th
Cap food delivery spending at approximately ₹5,845 this month (half of last month's spend)
insights: Food delivery is her single largest discretionary expense, consistently split across Swiggy and Zomato
She has a goal of saving ₹15 lakh in 2 years for a house down payment
She has an active SIP of ₹10,000/month as part of her committed outflows
Her discretionary spending categories include food delivery, groceries, fuel, and entertainment
